description: Full 8-hour overnight: cron cleanup, worktree triage, code quality, audit, hygiene, AII triage, summary

phases.name: Cron Cleanup & Reconfiguration
phases.description: Purge stale one-shot cron jobs, fix recurring job targets

tasks.name_template: Phase 1: Purge stale cron jobs and fix targets
tasks.instructions_template:
Cron cleanup for Jarvis overnight system:

1. Run `openclaw cron list` to see all jobs.
2. Delete ALL one-shot (kind=at) jobs that have already fired. Use `openclaw cron remove <id>` for each.
3. Delete these stale recurring jobs (PRs merged, no longer needed):
   - Any job with 'watch-openclaw-core-pr-125' or 'watch-openclaw-core-pr-126' in the name
   - Any job with 'workflow_slo_guard' in the name
4. Verify the two jarvis: cron jobs (nightly-kickoff and nightly-heartbeat) point to /Users/spencerthomson/clawd/core in their message payload. If they still reference /Users/spencerthomson/clawd-automation, update them.
5. Run `openclaw cron list` again and write final state to ~/clawd/artifacts/nightly/phase1-cron-cleanup-{DATE}.md

Do NOT delete: Daily Clawdbot security check, Nightly Desktop Cleanup, jarvis:nightly-kickoff, jarvis:nightly-heartbeat.

phases.name: Worktree Triage & Cleanup
phases.description: Prune merged worktrees, review pending fixes, document decisions

tasks.instructions_template:
Prune merged/dead worktrees in ~/clawd/core:
1. Run `git -C ~/clawd/core worktree list` to see current state.
2. Remove `core-model-routing-v2` worktree (already merged): `git -C ~/clawd/core worktree remove ~/clawd/_worktrees/core-model-routing-v2 --force`
3. Run `git -C ~/clawd/core worktree prune --verbose`
4. Check for any /tmp worktrees and clean them.
5. Write results to ~/clawd/artifacts/nightly/phase2-worktree-prune-{DATE}.md with before/after worktree count.

Review the stream-limiter fix worktree:
1. cd ~/clawd/_worktrees/core-stream-limiter
2. Run: git log --oneline main..HEAD
3. Run: git diff main..HEAD --stat
4. Run: git diff main..HEAD (full diff, read carefully)
5. Assess:
   - Is this a complete, self-contained fix?
   - Any TypeScript errors introduced? Run: pnpm tsgo --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -v 'ui/' | tail -20
   - Does it have tests?
   - Any risk to merge?
6. Write review to ~/clawd/artifacts/nightly/worktree-review-stream-limiter-{DATE}.md with verdict: MERGE / NEEDS_WORK / REJECT and rationale.

Review the zombie-recovery fix worktree:
1. cd ~/clawd/_worktrees/core-zombie-recovery
2. Run: git log --oneline main..HEAD
3. Run: git diff main..HEAD --stat
4. Run: git diff main..HEAD (full diff, read carefully)
5. Assess:
   - Is this a complete, self-contained fix?
   - Any TypeScript errors introduced?
   - Does it have tests?
   - Any risk to merge?
6. Write review to ~/clawd/artifacts/nightly/worktree-review-zombie-recovery-{DATE}.md with verdict: MERGE / NEEDS_WORK / REJECT and rationale.

Assess two Codex-generated worktrees created 2026-03-25:

1. ~/clawd/_worktrees/core-orphaned-subagent-cleanup-20260325 (branch: codex_spencer/orphaned-subagent-cleanup-20260325)
   - Run: git log --oneline main..HEAD
   - Run: git diff main..HEAD --stat
   - Assess: is this complete? Self-contained? Worth merging?

2. ~/clawd/_worktrees/core-session-restore-recovery-20260325 (branch: codex_spencer/session-restore-recovery-20260325)
   - Same assessment.

Write findings to ~/clawd/artifacts/nightly/worktree-review-codex-overnight-{DATE}.md with per-worktree verdict.

phases.name: Code Quality & Tests
phases.description: TypeScript check, lint, test suite, build verification

tasks.instructions_template:
Run TypeScript and lint checks on ~/clawd/core:
1. cd ~/clawd/core && pnpm tsgo --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -40
   Note: ~411 pre-existing ui/ errors are expected baseline. Only flag NEW errors.
2. pnpm check 2>&1 | tail -30
3. If format issues found: pnpm format:fix then re-run pnpm check
4. pnpm build 2>&1 | tail -30 (confirm clean build)
Write results to ~/clawd/artifacts/nightly/phase3-tsgo-lint-{DATE}.md with clear pass/fail and any new error details.

Run the full test suite on ~/clawd/core:
cd ~/clawd/core && OPENCLAW_TEST_PROFILE=low OPENCLAW_TEST_SERIAL_GATEWAY=1 pnpm test --run 2>&1 | tail -100

Baseline: ~47 pre-existing failures. Only flag NEW failures.
Write results to ~/clawd/artifacts/nightly/phase3-tests-{DATE}.md with:
- Total tests run / passed / failed / skipped
- Any NEW failures (not in the 47 baseline)
- Memory usage / duration notes

phases.name: Nightly Audit & Spark Ops
phases.description: Spark health, AII preflight, security audit

tasks.instructions_template:
Run the Spark nightly report: ~/clawd/scripts/spark_nightly_report.sh 2>&1 | tail -40
If it fails, try ~/clawd/core/scripts/spark_nightly_report.sh instead.
If Spark is unreachable (SSH timeout), write 'Spark unreachable' to the artifact and continue.
Write status to ~/clawd/artifacts/nightly/phase4-spark-report-{DATE}.md

Run the AII preflight script in quick mode:
~/clawd/scripts/spark_aii_preflight.sh --quick 2>&1 | tail -40
If it fails, try ~/clawd/core/scripts/spark_aii_preflight.sh --quick instead.
Write status to ~/clawd/artifacts/nightly/phase4-aii-preflight-{DATE}.md

Run a read-only security audit:
openclaw security audit 2>&1 | tail -40
Do NOT run openclaw doctor.
Write findings to ~/clawd/artifacts/nightly/phase4-security-{DATE}.md

phases.name: Repo Hygiene & AII Triage
phases.description: Branch cleanup, PR status, AII critical issue review

tasks.instructions_template:
Run repo hygiene checks:
1. Delete merged branches in ~/clawd/core: git branch --merged main | grep -v 'main\|HEAD' | xargs git branch -d 2>/dev/null || true
2. Drop stale git stashes older than 30 days (keep top 2): git -C ~/clawd/core stash list, then git stash drop for stashes beyond index 1
3. Check LaunchAgent health: launchctl list 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'clawd|aiintegrations|openclaw'
4. Check disk usage: du -sh ~/clawd/core ~/clawd/_worktrees ~/clawd/artifacts
Write to ~/clawd/artifacts/nightly/phase5-hygiene-{DATE}.md

Review all open PRs across AI Integrations repos. This is READ-ONLY - no merges, no commits.

1. For each repo (aiva-api, AII-Dashboard, AII-Chatbot, Autobuild, aii-scraper, aii-packages):
   gh pr list --repo AI-Integrations/$repo --state open --json number,title,headRefName,statusCheckRollup,updatedAt --limit 10

2. Read ~/clawd/artifacts/research/cross-repo-synthesis-2026-03-25.md for the 4 critical issues identified.

3. For each critical issue, verify current state:
   a. Dashboard broken verifyToken import - check PR #154
   b. Coordinated prompt-canon merge (aiva-api #75 + Autobuild #44)
   c. aii-packages publish workflow (PR #2)
   d. Scraper status format (aiva-api #72 + aii-scraper #58)

4. Write actionable triage to ~/clawd/artifacts/nightly/phase5-aii-triage-{DATE}.md with:
   - Per-repo PR summary table
   - Critical issues status update
   - Recommended merge order (4-wave plan)
   - Top 3 actions for Spencer

phases.name: Summary & Morning Prep
phases.description: Push changes, write summary, update memory and TODO

tasks.instructions_template:
Final overnight step:

1. GIT PUSH:
   cd ~/clawd/core && git add -u && git commit -m 'chore: nightly cleanup {DATE}' 2>/dev/null || true
   git push aii-private HEAD 2>/dev/null || true
   git push fork HEAD 2>/dev/null || true
   cd ~/clawd && git push origin $(git branch --show-current) 2>/dev/null || true

2. OVERNIGHT SUMMARY:
   Read ALL artifacts from ~/clawd/artifacts/nightly/ matching pattern *-{DATE}.md
   Write ~/clawd/artifacts/nightly/overnight-summary-{DATE}.md with sections:
   - Executive Summary (3 sentences)
   - What Ran (phase-by-phase pass/fail)
   - Worktree Decisions (per-worktree recommendation from phase 2 reviews)
   - AII Triage (top 3 actions from phase 5)
   - Cron Health (final state from phase 1)
   - Blockers (anything needing Spencer's input)
   - Top 3 Priorities for Today

3. DESKTOP DELIVERY:
   cp ~/clawd/artifacts/nightly/overnight-summary-{DATE}.md ~/Desktop/overnight-summary-{DATE}.md

4. TODO UPDATE:
   Read ~/clawd/TODO.md. Update based on tonight's findings:
   - If cron jobs fixed: mark T-0069 done
   - Update T-0065 with worktree decisions
   - Update T-0067 with AII triage findings
   Add any new items discovered tonight.

5. MEMORY UPDATE:
   Append tonight's key findings to ~/clawd/memory/2026-03-25.md (create if missing).
